body.summary: Regime shift day: US-Iran-Israel 2-week ceasefire removed the Geopolitical Shock regime. T-001 energy thesis broken. DBO stop triggered. Full rebalance executed (EXIT XLE+DBO, reduce IAU, add BIL+XLP). 8 segments updated. 2 deep dives produced. All phases passed except Phase 8 (Supabase unreachable, sandbox proxy 403).
body.triage_notes: Excellent accuracy. Ceasefire event qualified all 8 updated segments as material. No false positives. Alt-data update (F&G 17 rising from 11) correctly flagged as regime-transition signal.
body.materialization_notes: DIGEST.md reads cleanly as a full daily digest. TOP LINE section ensures portfolio actions are front-and-center. Decision tables clear. Deliberation.md documents full PM challenge/defense cycle.
body.data_quality_notes: WebSearch (multiple sources triangulated), FRED API (10Y 4.34%, 2Y 3.84% confirmed April 6 closes), Alpha Vantage (SPY $659.22 April 7 confirmed). AV rate-limited after 2 queries. WebSearch estimates used for ETF prices (XLE, IAU, DBO, XLP) — adequate for delta, not precision-level.
body.strengths: Regime shift correctly identified and documented. High-quality deliberation with PM challenge/defense cycle. Iran peace deal probability tree deep dive is portfolio-actionable with explicit thresholds. Thorough T-001 forensics. Excellent source triangulation on ceasefire data.
body.weaknesses: ETF price precision limited by AV rate limits. Tearsheet/Supabase blocked (environment IP-001). No individual sector-by-sector analysis (handled at triage level — adequate for delta day but sub-optimal). git-commit.sh requires manual bypass due to IP-008.
